name: Sequence
description: Lets AI agents send, split, and route real money across bank accounts, cards, and apps via one API — with scoped keys, server-side spend limits, and audit trails.

skills.name: Agentic Money Movement
skills.description: Lets agents send, split, and route real money across linked bank accounts, cards, and apps via one API.

skills.name: Scoped Spend Limits
skills.description: Enforces server-side spend limits and scoped API keys so agent-initiated payments stay within policy.

skills.name: Payment Audit Trails
skills.description: Records every agent-initiated transaction with a full audit trail for compliance and reconciliation.
